headline: A Look At Federal Realty (FRT) Valuation After Strong Q1 Beat And Raised 2026 Guidance
summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) just reported first quarter 2026 results that beat analyst expectations, accompanied by record leasing activity, active capital recycling, and a higher full year earnings outlook that has contributed to recent stock interest. See our latest analysis for Federal Realty Investment Trust. headline: REITs Excel, Earnings Swell, Fed Rebels
